dynamicChoiceSets.name: UserPicklist
dynamicChoiceSets.filterLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 4

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Totals
fields.fieldText:
Totals: Outstanding Document Value = {!TotalOutstanding}

Home Outstanding Value = {!HomeOutstanding}

fields.fieldText:
